name: Cucumber Dill Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 medium cucumbers, peeled, seeded and chopped
2 teaspoons snipped fresh dill, OR 1/2 teaspoon dried dill weed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well mixed.
3. Cover and chill for 2 hours or more.
